category_sources: Official Mailpit docs describe an SMTP server, web interface, and API for testing intercepted emails.
source_facts.description says "Web and API based SMTP testing".
display_name_sources: Official docs page title and navigation use Mailpit.
docs_sources: Official Mailpit documentation page at mailpit.axllent.org/docs includes installation, configuration, usage, development, and API sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/axllent/mailpit, so repo was intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Mailpit docs describe web UI, SMTP server, REST API, and integration testing support.
